what_it_does: Records a channel-memory attachment that links an attachment entity to a board item via a board:// URI.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with metadata fields.
It is associated with the 'dragnet-development' channel.
It includes an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset.
standouts: The target uses a 'board://' URI scheme to reference an external board item.
The attachment_type is 'board_items', indicating a cross-system reference.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with an 'id' prefixed by 'att-'.
Stored under channel-memory/channel_attachments/ following a flat, ID-named file convention.
notes: A lightweight metadata stub that records when a board item was attached to a channel memory entry.
questions: What content or discussion does board://item-36fde950 represent?
Why was this board item attached to the dragnet-development channel at this time?
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped association between a channel memory record and a specific board item.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to reference a target outside the file itself.
contribution: Provides a persistent, typed link between a channel memory attachment and a board item, supporting provenance and cross-reference lookup.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel-memory attachment file of type board_items that references board://item-36fde950 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a specific board item was attached to the dragnet-development channel memory at a known time.
